title: Fix: Divide by zero error
original_text: Fixed divide by zero error in calculation module. Added zero division checks before arithmetic operations. Implemented error handling for division operations. Added unit tests for edge cases. Added input validation for denominators. Result: divide by zero error fixed.
expected_subject: fix(core): fix divide by zero error
expected_body_lines: - Add zero division checks before arithmetic operations
- Implement error handling for division operations
- Add unit tests for edge cases
- Validation: divide by zero error fixed
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(core): fix divide by zero error"
